purpose: Record manual no-promotion review decisions for official-output captures that expose Sequencing.com output boundaries but still lack source-bound sample/result rows and citation bindings.

currentLedgerContext.explanation: This review artifact has 22 historical review entries because Dysautonomia was later captured as row-evidence-ready and moved outside the current 21-target formal blocker ledger.

standard: A capture can support sample-backed formal promotion only when non-empty sampleRows are source-bound, formalFields are covered, and row citation bindings are ready or not required by the capture.
Redacted official output is usable only when redaction preserves concrete non-private row or field structure and source bindings.
Detail metadata, described fields, generated-output presence, route fallbacks, and empty reportFile values do not create sampleRows, resultRows, or citationBindings.

reviewedPromotionCandidates.title: Connective Tissue Disorders and EDS
nextEvidenceNeeded: Official non-private sample report or export for this exact package
Sanitized completed-output artifact preserving non-private rows and source IDs

evidencePresent: Authenticated field boundaries for search/result columns

nextEvidenceNeeded: Official sample or demo result set
